text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Narita Brian! Narita Brian has taken first place!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...You really are a beast. Just how strong are ya
gonna get?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Afraid, are you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Don't be stupid.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm just lookin' forward to the day I take you
down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm not just going to sit around waiting for
you. I have to keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Perfect. Wait for me as you move forward, then.
I'll catch up soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh.

Both of them silently extend a hand toward the
other.

They shake hands firmly, surrounded by
magnificent applause.
The next day, in front of the hospital...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Physical Therapist
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? Your mother didn't tell you? Well, you
see... Your sister is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sis!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, Brian! Why are you so out of breath?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Is it true?! Mom said your leg is better!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes. I've made a full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can move my leg freely and have finally been
discharged from the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It took quite a long time, I know, but it seems like
you and I can finally race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm... Haha...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's so funny?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You know back when you invited me to Tracen
Academy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What would you have done if I told you I wouldn't
go?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Would you still have gone forward and continued
running in the Twinkle Series?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... This is all completely hypothetical, of
course...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I think I'd have continued running. I'd have
kept polishing myself until I was able give you the
race you've always been looking for.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I see... Tough as always.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sis...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: My next race is the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, I know. I'll meet you there.
